description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes a new package version to PyPI when a tag matching v*.*.* is pushed. The workflow should have three jobs: build-package to checkout, set up Python 3.12, run make setup-ci and make build, and upload the distribution as an artifact; publish-package to download the artifact, and publish it to PyPI; and generate-release to download the artifact, sign it with Sigstore, and generate a GitHub release with the signed files.
